description: Ployjued's bland life takes a sudden turn when Phupha, a top senior she has a crush on, invites her to join him on his dangerous mission to expose the Chantharusati Family, a strange cult gaining followers throughout their province. Her hopes of getting closer to Phupha, however, face an obstacle as her every move is watched by Wutthikrai, an untrustworthy Chantharusati follower. Worse, "Father," the cult's prophet, seems to take a special interest in her—to a life-threatening degree.
